expectations.text: Uses jekyll-picture-tag plugin (or equivalent responsive image solution)
Gemfile includes version pin for the plugin
expectations.evidence: No gem to pin — uses CDN approach

expectations.text: Configuration includes WebP format with fallback
expectations.evidence: Lines 58-65: source type=image/webp with JPEG fallback img

expectations.text: Configuration includes multiple widths for srcset (at least 480, 800, 1200)
Includes lazy loading attribute in configuration
Notes about LCP optimization for above-the-fold images
expectations.evidence: Lines 89-128: separate critical variant with fetchpriority=high, no lazy loading

expectations.text: Mentions Netlify build pipeline (no extra setup needed)
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-6: 'Netlify Image CDN works at the edge — no gems or plugins required'
